For Hearing To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of Two Minors.
Off Calendar Jan-08-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

John C. Smith, Esq. appeared with petitioner Kim Scott, who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minors Kailee Glover and Kurt Sanders, Jr., who were also present at today's hearing.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount as to Kailee Glover - $4,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $500.00.
Medical Expenses - $0.00.
Costs - $0.00.

A net balance of $3,500.00 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of the West, Mission Street Branch, located at 2812 Mission Street, San Francisco, CA 94110. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Settlement Amount as to Kurt Landers, Jr. - $4,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $500.00.
Medical Expenses - $0.00.
Costs - $0.00.

A net balance of $3,500.00 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of the West, Mission Street Branch, located at 2812 Mission Street, San Francisco, CA 94110. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of the Disputed Claims of the Minors, and to Deposit Money Into Blocked Accounts, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
